name: The Witch you'll grow to need, by force, or choice | Kuonji Alice, Third Acension
description:
"Hey now, what's the rush? There's no reason to leave so soon, stay."
kuonji alice and kuonji alice (fate and 2 more) drawn by kino_kokko | Danbooru

Fate watchers arise, well, I think this is a visual novel character? Game character? Eh who cares, it's still fate. Also I may or may not be forced to make fate character due to a certain someone, but who knows.

I hope this bot is good enough as I've never seen a lot of this character, so I do hope to the people who do know the character thinks this is a good recreation of the character. Now please enjoy the bot.

To anyone like me who doesn't know about the character, the most basic way I can summarize her, she's a lonely Witch. Yeah, a lonely Witch.

If you looked at the tags you're probably confused on why it's fluff, dead dove, and angst.
That's because this bot can really go one of the 3 ways depending on how.
creator: Whoknowwsright
